body:
## Implementation summary

Implemented distraction-free Focus Mode (BIN-94) following the Founding Engineer's step-by-step plan.

**New files:**
- `src/hooks/useFocusMode.ts` — isFocusMode state, typewriterScroll pref (localStorage), Escape-key exit, typewriter scroll effect
- `src/hooks/useSessionTimer.ts` — timer state machine (idle/running/complete), preset durations, word count delta
- `src/components/FocusControls/FocusControls.tsx` — compact utility cluster (exit focus, typewriter toggle, timer presets/running/summary)
- `src/components/FocusControls/FocusControls.module.css` — muted-until-hover styling, responsive mobile bar

**Modified files:**
- `src/app/story/[id]/page.tsx` — added Focus button, useFocusMode/useSessionTimer hooks, FocusControls in canvas, data-focus-mode attribute, textarea ref
- `src/app/story/[id]/page.module.css` — focus mode layout overrides (single-column, centred 720px canvas, sidebar hidden, non-essential header controls hidden)

## Branch

`ticket/BIN-94`

## Commits

- `a72bc55` Implement distraction-free Focus Mode (BIN-94)

## Test evidence

```
$ npm run build
 ✓ Compiled successfully
 ✓ Generating static pages (6/6)
Route /story/[id]  41.3 kB  143 kB First Load JS
```

Build passes with zero type errors.

**Acceptance criteria coverage:**
- Enter/exit focus mode from editor with one action (Focus button + Escape key) ✓
- Non-essential panels hidden (sidebar, ViewModeSwitch, SaveStatus hidden via `data-focus-mode` CSS) ✓
- Typewriter scroll toggleable and persists across reload (localStorage) ✓
- Timer presets (15/30/45 min), elapsed/remaining display ✓
- Session complete summary with words written + Dismiss ✓

## Known limitations

- AppShell global nav remains visible in v1 (page-level containment only, per plan's risk mitigation)
- Typewriter scroll is JS-calculated on `input` events; may be slightly imprecise on very long documents

Assign to: Code Reviewer

## Implementation summary

Implemented distraction-free Focus Mode for BIN-94 following the Founding Engineer's plan.

**New files:**
- `src/hooks/useFocusMode.ts` — isFocusMode state, typewriterScroll pref (localStorage), Escape-key exit, typewriter scroll effect
- `src/hooks/useSessionTimer.ts` — timer state machine (idle/running/complete), preset durations, word count delta
- `src/components/FocusControls/FocusControls.tsx` — compact utility cluster (exit focus, typewriter toggle, timer presets/running/summary)
- `src/components/FocusControls/FocusControls.module.css` — muted-until-hover styling, responsive mobile bar

**Modified files:**
- `src/app/story/[id]/page.tsx` — added Focus button, useFocusMode/useSessionTimer hooks, FocusControls in canvas, data-focus-mode attribute, textarea ref
- `src/app/story/[id]/page.module.css` — focus mode layout overrides (single-column, centred 720px canvas, sidebar hidden, non-essential header controls hidden)

## Branch

`ticket/BIN-94`

## Commits

- `a72bc55` Implement distraction-free Focus Mode (BIN-94)

## Test evidence

```
$ npm run build
 ✓ Compiled successfully in 1593ms
 ✓ Generating static pages (6/6)
Route /story/[id]  41.3 kB  143 kB First Load JS
```

Build passes with zero type errors.

**Acceptance criteria coverage:**
- Enter/exit focus mode from editor with one action (Focus button + Escape key) ✓
- Non-essential panels hidden (sidebar, ViewModeSwitch, SaveStatus hidden via `data-focus-mode` CSS) ✓
- Typewriter scroll toggleable and persists across reload (localStorage) ✓
- Timer presets (15/30/45 min), elapsed/remaining display ✓
- Session complete summary with words written + Dismiss ✓

## Known limitations

- AppShell global nav remains visible in v1 (page-level containment only, per plan's risk mitigation)
- Typewriter scroll is JS-calculated on `input` events; may be slightly imprecise on very long documents

## Handoff

Assign to: Code Reviewer

Implementation plan added to issue description.

- New files: `src/hooks/useFocusMode.ts`, `useSessionTimer.ts`, `src/components/FocusControls/*`
- Modified: `src/app/story/[id]/page.tsx`, `page.module.css`
- Key decisions: data-focus-mode CSS attr hides sidebar+ViewModeSwitch+header controls (page-level only, not AppShell); typewriter scroll via textarea scrollTop adjustment; session timer captures word-count delta; localStorage persists typewriter pref

Assign to: Code Monkey
Recovery ticket; previous issue stuck (checkout 409) and cancelled. Previous: BIN-90.
